form.formComment: First starter. Three-year-old gelding by Moonlark out of Oakwood Lady. At the most recent trial finished seventh at Scone over 900m. May need it on what we've seen.

form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of five-and-a-half months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign second last of 9 at Coonabarabran Super Mdn October 26 over 1200m, 11 len behind Somerton Smart carrying 57kg at $21. First up last campaign second of 8 at this track Mdn September 8 over 1200m, soft track; a head behind Brutal Elegance carrying 55.5kg at $19. Looks all set for a bright return.
